meaning: n.(宗教)禁忌、避讳,禁止接近,禁止使用adj.禁忌的,忌讳的vt.禁忌,避讳,禁制,禁止
examples: The topic of addiction remains something of a taboo in our family.
Her brisk treatment of an almost taboo subject was a breath of fresh air.
Cancer is a taboo subject and people are frightened or embarrassed to talk openly about it.
But Davis says despite the country's Catholic culture, condoms are not religiously taboo in Haiti.
This is a major break in post-WWII policy, in which aggression became a fundamental taboo.
